plaintext: Tadi ke kantor imigrasi untuk membuat paspor baru. Katanya bisa membuat paspor kilat/same-day dengan biaya tambahan (resmi). Setelah ke sana, ternyata ga bisa, ada persyaratan-persyaratan khusus yang entah kenapa nggak disosialisasikan. Kirain cuma perlu bayar lebih. :(
translation: Today I went to the immigration office to make a new passport. They told me that I could make a same-day passport with an additional fee (official). After that, I found out that it was not possible, there were special requirements that I didn't know about. I thought it was just a matter of paying more. :(
